question_text:
Sqrt(x)

Given a non-negative integer x, return the square root of x rounded down to the nearest integer. The returned integer should be non-negative as well.
explanation: By enforcing strict bounded geometric iteration rather than raw physical loops dynamically mapping pure standard O(logN) Binary Search implicitly perfectly extracts the accurate bound mapping perfectly mathematically rounding the explicitly mapped boundaries down directly into optimized safe integer constraint returns inherently isolated accurately mapping results dynamically.
